OG IMAGE PLACEHOLDER
====================
This file is a reminder to create a default Open Graph image.

The image is shown when someone shares your site on social media (Twitter/X,
LinkedIn, Slack, iMessage, etc.) and no page-specific image is available.

Required specs:
  - File name: og-default.png
  - Dimensions: 1200 × 630 pixels
  - Format: PNG or JPEG
  - Content: Channel name, tagline, branding (logo, colors)

Steps:
  1. Design the image in Figma, Canva, or any image editor
  2. Export as og-default.png (1200×630)
  3. Drop it into /public/
  4. Delete this .txt file

Until you do this, social share previews will show a broken image.
